title: Light Festive Grapefruit Salad
description: A floral and light Filipino dish featuring grapefruit juice, broiled to perfection in a dairy-free-friendly manner.
instructions: Wash and slice the grapefruit into thin wedges.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced grapefruit and some sesame seeds (if using).
Preheat your broiler to high heat.
Place the grapefruit slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Sprinkle with salt.
Broil for about 2 minutes per side or until lightly caramelized and slightly crispy.
Serve immediately as a light festive snack.
